mapper.select:
select * from clazz
name like concat('%',#{name},'%')
order by update_time desc
mapper.insert: insert into clazz(name, subject, begin_date, end_date, create_time, update_time) values (#{name}, #{subject}, #{beginDate}, #{endDate}, #{createTime}, #{updateTime})
mapper.delete:
delete from clazz where id in
#{id}
